arguments.artifact_content:
metadata:
  id: EVAL-CC
  type: ControlCatalog
  gemara-version: "1.0"
  description: |
    A minimal but valid control catalog for determinism evaluation.
  author:
    id: eval-harness
    name: Evaluation Harness
    type: Software
  mapping-references:
    - id: CCC
      title: FINOS Cloud Control Catalog
      version: "2025.01"
      url: https://github.com/finos/common-cloud-controls
      description: FINOS CCC control framework
  applicability-groups:
    - id: standard
      title: Standard
      description: Applies to all standard deployments.
title: Evaluation Control Catalog
groups:
  - id: data-protection
    title: Data Protection
    description: Controls ensuring data confidentiality and integrity.
controls:
  - id: EVAL-CC.C01
    group: data-protection
    title: Enforce Encryption in Transit
    state: Active
    objective: |
      Ensure all network communication uses TLS 1.2 or higher to prevent
      interception of data in transit.
    threats:
      - reference-id: CCC
        entries:
          - reference-id: CCC.TH02
            remarks: Data is intercepted in transit
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: EVAL-CC.C01.TR01
        state: Active
        text: |
          When a port is exposed for network traffic, the service MUST
          require TLS 1.2 or higher for all connections.
        applicability:
          - standard

name: Validate ControlCatalog with wrong metadata type

arguments.artifact_content:
metadata:
  id: EVAL-BAD
  type: ThreatCatalog
  gemara-version: "1.0"
  description: |
    A ControlCatalog with the wrong metadata.type — validated against
    #ControlCatalog, which must reject the ThreatCatalog type value.
  author:
    id: eval-harness
    name: Evaluation Harness
    type: Software
title: Invalid Control Catalog (Wrong Type)
groups:
  - id: data-protection
    title: Data Protection
    description: Controls for data integrity.
controls:
  - id: EVAL-BAD.C01
    group: data-protection
    title: Placeholder Control
    state: Active
    objective: |
      This control exists solely to test type-mismatch detection.
      The metadata.type is ThreatCatalog but the definition is #ControlCatalog.
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: EVAL-BAD.C01.TR01
        state: Active
        text: |
          When invoked, the service MUST verify the artifact type matches
          the requested schema definition.
        applicability:
          - standard

metadata:
  id: EVAL-TC
  type: ThreatCatalog
  gemara-version: "1.0"
  description: |
    A minimal but valid threat catalog for determinism evaluation.
  author:
    id: eval-harness
    name: Evaluation Harness
    type: Software
  mapping-references:
    - id: EVAL-CC
      title: Evaluation Control Catalog
      version: "1.0.0"
      url: https://example.com/eval-cc
      description: Control catalog used as a reference for capability mappings
title: Evaluation Threat Catalog
groups:
  - id: data-threats
    title: Data Threats
    description: Threats related to data confidentiality and integrity.
threats:
  - id: EVAL-TC.THR01
    group: data-threats
    title: Data Intercepted in Transit
    description: |
      An adversary intercepts unencrypted network traffic to read or
      modify data being transmitted between services.
    capabilities:
      - reference-id: EVAL-CC
        entries:
          - reference-id: EVAL-CC.C01
            remarks: Encryption in transit mitigates interception

name: Validate ThreatCatalog with wrong metadata type

arguments.artifact_content:
metadata:
  id: EVAL-WRONGTYPE
  type: ControlCatalog
  gemara-version: "1.0"
  description: |
    This artifact declares metadata type ControlCatalog but is validated
    against ThreatCatalog, which should produce a type mismatch error.
  author:
    id: eval-harness
    name: Evaluation Harness
    type: Software
title: Wrong Type Artifact
groups:
  - id: data-protection
    title: Data Protection
    description: Controls ensuring data confidentiality and integrity.
controls:
  - id: EVAL-WRONGTYPE.C01
    group: data-protection
    title: Placeholder Control
    state: Active
    objective: |
      This control exists only to test type mismatch detection.
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: EVAL-WRONGTYPE.C01.TR01
        state: Active
        text: |
          When invoked, the service MUST verify the artifact type matches.
        applicability:
          - all

metadata:
  id: EVAL-MALFORMED
  type: ControlCatalog
  gemara-version: "1.0"
  description: |
    This file is intentionally malformed YAML to test error message determinism.
  [invalid yaml: missing closing bracket
  author:
    id: eval-harness
    name: Evaluation Harness
    type: Software
title: Malformed Control Catalog
groups:
  - id: test

metadata:
  id: EVAL-GC
  type: GuidanceCatalog
  gemara-version: "1.0"
  description: |
    A minimal valid GuidanceCatalog for determinism evaluation.
  author:
    id: eval-harness
    name: Evaluation Harness
    type: Software
  applicability-groups:
    - id: standard
      title: Standard
      description: Applies to all standard deployments.
title: Evaluation Guidance Catalog
type: "Best Practice"
groups:
  - id: secure-defaults
    title: Secure Defaults
    description: Guidance on establishing secure default configurations.
guidelines:
  - id: EVAL-GC.G01
    group: secure-defaults
    title: Disable Unused Services
    state: Active
    text: |
      All unused services and ports SHOULD be disabled by default to reduce
      the attack surface of the deployment.
    applicability:
      - standard

name: Validate artifact with unknown definition type

arguments.artifact_content:
metadata:
  id: EVAL-UNK
  type: ControlCatalog
  gemara-version: "1.0"
  description: |
    A valid YAML artifact submitted with an unknown definition parameter
    to test determinism of the error response path.
  author:
    id: eval-harness
    name: Evaluation Harness
    type: Software
  applicability-groups:
    - id: standard
      title: Standard
      description: Applies to all standard deployments.
title: Unknown Definition Test Artifact
groups:
  - id: test-group
    title: Test Group
    description: A test group.
controls:
  - id: EVAL-UNK.C01
    group: test-group
    title: Test Control
    state: Active
    objective: A test control objective.
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: EVAL-UNK.C01.TR01
        state: Active
        text: Test requirement.
        applicability:
          - standard

metadata:
  id: EVAL-POL
  type: Policy
  gemara-version: "1.0"
  description: |
    A minimal valid Policy artifact for determinism evaluation.
  author:
    id: eval-harness
    name: Evaluation Harness
    type: Software
title: Evaluation Security Policy
contacts:
  responsible:
    - id: security-team
      name: Security Team
      type: Team
  accountable:
    - id: ciso
      name: CISO
      type: Person
  consulted: []
  informed: []
scope:
  in:
    technologies:
      - "Cloud Infrastructure"
    sensitivity:
      - "Confidential"
      - "Restricted"
imports:
  policies: []
  controls: []
  guidelines: []
adherence:
  exceptions-process: |
    Exceptions must be submitted to the security team with a written
    justification and approved by the CISO.
  enforcement: |
    Violations will be reviewed by the security committee and may result
    in remediation requirements or disciplinary action.

name: Threat assessment for Kubernetes multi-tenant PII system
Threat assessment for CI/CD pipeline with unsigned images
Threat assessment for object storage service
Threat assessment for secrets management vault
Control catalog for Kubernetes workload protection
Control catalog for logging and audit
Control catalog for identity and access management
Control catalog for data encryption service
Control catalog for container image supply chain
